title: Information Retrieval & BM25
content:
# BM25 Model

## 1. Mathematical Equation
$$\text{Score}(D, Q) = \sum_{q_i \in Q} \text{IDF}(q_i) \frac{f(q_i, D) (k_1 + 1)}{f(q_i, D) + k_1 (1 - b + b \frac{|D|}{\text{avgdl}})}$$

## 2. Hyperparameter Defaults
*   $k_1 \approx 1.5$: Term frequency saturation parameter.
*   $b \approx 0.75$: Document length normalization parameter.
